; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-04-17T17:47:44Z

AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]] > [[5728643844066569666]]#[[254547437090201330]]
        REBUILD [[18195120765075523889]]
            LOCATE BEFORE ALL
            REPLACE { ~&6504222003&~(~&"13476164202266599376&~).~&197080195&~(~&7712900563799906&~ + 1) } WITH { "" }
        END REBUILD
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
